name: City Street Lamp: "Low Lanternlight"
description: Stone streetlamps like these can be seen along town roads. Their design balances function with quiet elegance. By day, they serve as subtle ornaments of the streetscape. By night, they transform into steadfast companions — beacons that illuminate the path and keep the encroaching shadows at bay.\nTo keep their light focused where it is needed most, these streetlamps are installed at carefully controlled heights. This prevents the light from spilling beyond the road, allowing each lamp to clearly illuminate the path for passing pedestrians.
